Harmonic continuation explorer

A musician remembers a phrase and a context; this view asks the analogous model question. Given a harmonic n-gram, which overlapping n-gram tends to come next, and how does that answer change by genre?

Window length
Condition on
Source phrase
Remembered context
WindowH3
Global support

How to read the chart

Each continuation is another harmonic n-gram. It overlaps the source by n-1 chords and adds a new final chord. The bars show empirical transition probability inside the selected scope.

Likely continuations

The explorer is built from adjacent harmonic transition events in the conditional language model output. It is intentionally count-based and interpretable: the goal is to show the data layer needed before building a more flexible recommender or generative model.
